summaryForNext: 4 changes ordered by dependency + security-gate: add-oauth-endpoint-hardening (G1, exposure gate — build first) -> add-bcrypt-secrets (G2, one new crate, shares the client-verify path) -> add-identity-classification-edges (G3, independent small fixes) -> add-actor-token-and-hydra-delegate (G4, completes delegation on the hardened surface). Backend openspec, driver kbd-apply (one task/turn). Every change: artifact-refiner + security-review QA, explicit fail-closed test, re-audit every authorize entry point, archive via --skip-specs. First to apply: add-oauth-endpoint-hardening.
